model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible * post_daca + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + C(educ) + UNEMP + LFPR", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="HC1")
sample_selection: statefip is a U.S. state or District of Columbia with a matching state-year policy row
